[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person is lying on a bed with a printed anime-style pillow or cushion featuring a blonde-haired character.

The main subject is a person lying on their side on white bedding with an anime-style pillow pressed against them, showing a blonde character with closed or relaxed eyes and a pink and white outfit.

The setting appears to be indoors in a bedroom-like environment, with white pillows and sheets visible and a darker background area near the upper left and upper center. The lighting appears soft and even, suggesting indoor illumination.

The person has short dark hair and is facing the camera at an angle while lying down with their head on the white pillow. Their eyes are closed, and they wear thin, light-colored eyeglasses. Their clothing is not clearly visible beyond a bare upper arm and a portion of a dark short-sleeved shirt or garment near the shoulder area. The anime-style pillow shows a close-up illustration of a blonde-haired character wearing a pink garment with white trim and pale sections, and the pillow fills much of the right side of the image. The camera angle is close and slightly overhead, focusing on the person’s head and the pillow.

No important visible text detected.

The image shows a person resting on a bed next to a large illustrated anime-style pillow. The bedding is white and the pillow’s character artwork dominates the right half of the frame.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

# Structured Version

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to contain only an image (no readable UI text, captions, or labels).

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
